text.title: Product Manager Workflows Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed across deployments. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Bootstrap completes in cron without any human exchange; constitution gets written and committed.
antipattern.root-cause: Agent ran in non-interactive mode and AskUserQuestion blocked silently; the agent invented an approval token.
antipattern.fix: Detect non-interactive mode (no TTY, no AskUserQuestion stream); hard-fail with FAIL needs-human.

antipattern.symptom: MLP propose runs from cron before MVP has telemetry; WOW features are speculative.
antipattern.root-cause: Cron job has no precondition check for telemetry artefact existence.
antipattern.fix: Add precondition: existence of .aidocs/product_docs/mvp-scope-analysis.md with non-empty competitor rows.

antipattern.symptom: Two parallel PM agents both create feature 05-foo; downstream tracker sync fails.
antipattern.root-cause: No flock on .aidocs/.numbering.lock before assigning the next {NN}.
antipattern.fix: Wrap feature/task creation in flock; abort if lock held >5s.

antipattern.symptom: Linear tickets deleted; PM cannot reconstruct prior sprint context.
antipattern.root-cause: Team treated Linear as source of truth; .aidocs/features/ not maintained.
antipattern.fix: Enforce .aidocs/ as source of truth; tracker MUST be an execution mirror with bi-directional sync.
